for.p: an authority to which this section applies

to.p: have due regard to the desirability of exercising its functions in a way that is designed to reduce the inequalities of outcome which result from socio-economic disadvantage

condition.p: making decisions of a strategic nature about how to exercise its functions.

for.p: an authority to which this section applies

to.p: take into account any guidance issued in accordance with subsection (2A)

condition.p: deciding how to fulfil a duty to which it is subject under subsection (1).

to.p: by regulations, amend section 1 so as to—

ul.li: (a) add a public authority to the authorities that are subject to the duty under subsection (1) of that section;
(b) remove an authority from those that are subject to the duty;
in the case of a particular authority,
only in relation to certain functions that it has;
(d) in the case of an authority to which the application of the duty is already restricted to certain functions,

to.p: impose a duty on an authority in relation to any devolved Scottish functions or devolved Welsh functions.

for.p: The Scottish Ministers or the Welsh Ministers

ul.li: (a) add a relevant authority to the authorities that are subject to the duty under subsection (1) of that section;
(b) remove a relevant authority from those that are subject to the duty;
in the case of a particular relevant authority,
only in relation to certain functions that it has;
(d) in the case of a relevant authority to which the application of the duty is already restricted to certain functions,

to.p: make any amendments of section 1 that appear to the Minister or Ministers to be necessary or expedient in consequence of provision made under subsection (1) or (as the case may be) subsection (4).
